message:
feat(demo_showcase): add tour determinism regression tests (bd-bqd1)

- Add 4 tour determinism tests: determinism_snapshot, step_titles_present,
  deterministic_across_runs, exits_cleanly
- Extract tour state from JSON with step_transition_frames for stable snapshots
- Tour runs with --max-frames 3000 to ensure completion
- Verify identical output across runs with same seed
- Fix unused import warnings in demo_showcase.rs

Tests verify:
- Tour completes successfully in headless mode
- Step transitions are recorded with titles
- Same seed produces identical output
- Tour exits cleanly at final step

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
